title: Badaa Karara Pudna
overview: Badaa Karara Pudna follows the journey of six spirited sisters who reunite for an unexpected challenge. What begins as a nostalgic attempt to relive their youthful days soon turns into an emotional rollercoaster as old wounds resurface, egos clash, and differences threaten to break them apart. With its blend of emotion, humor, and celebration, the film captures the essence of tradition, the power of togetherness and stands as a true ode to womanhood.
